segments.text: Today is the happiest day for all of you,
For whole universe because Shri Ganesha was created.
He has been created to emit auspiciousness through His Chaitanya
First the whole cosmos was filled with this Chaitanyashruti
Then Brahmadeva came into play and He created all the matter.
But, The greatest blessings of divine power was to symbolize Chaitanya
And this chaitanya has many aspects but specially in Sri Ganesha it is auspiciousness
In these modern times, people have lost the sense of auspiciousness.
Everything that emits vibrations, chaitanya is auspicious – it's shubha and whatever
does not…is not by any chance auspicious so first for all what ever you worshiped
Whatever you accept, all of them have to be auspicious things.
Every shape has a co-efficient and the shapes which we see not necessarily give vibrations
but in human beings also there are many people like You who have chaitanya flowing
But this Chaitanya, when it flows we just take Shri Ganesha for granted.
We do not understand that to awaken Shri Ganesa within us means what?
What have you got there is already existing in You and as I said innocence cannot be
lost so Shri Ganesh has eternal being, eternal child he can't been lost
and he cannot be destroyed, so He is all the time there.
Maybe some clouds of your ill-doings are covering
The great personality
Of innocence but it's always there present
So now what should we do to keep this Ganesha
All that I'm shining within us
is to first remember that you were made in the same pattern as Shri Ganesha.
But His Kundalini on his stomach, His pure desire
Is very significant
To understand why it's there
That His kundalini
On His stomach
That means He does not have
To conquer the temptations of Mooladhara at all
But he has his Kundalini on the stomach.
That means, He's also beyond the temptations of food or power
Or anything because His stomach represents absolute abandonment
Absolute freedom
He's not bothered as to how he looks that these days there is a big fashion, you cannot
have the belly.
I mean this becoming of being not only fashion but also business and age grows even small
children look so sweet those people who are very thin must understand they might
be getting some prizes in beauty contest or something
But they do not have that majesty, that royalty ,that dignity in them as we should have.
So Shri Ganesha accepts everything . He has a head with a trunk and he accepts it of
course is important because the head of an elephant suggests that he's not like
human being who develops ego, superego conditionings but he is just all the time one with the Divine.
He accepts his body ,he accepts His head .He accepts His ears and he accepts everything
that's made of him.
He doesn't aspire to something, some entrepreneurs put up ideas and he won´t go run after them.
He won't try to change himself, he wont' try create that fashion and all of it.
HE is what HE IS because HE is a satisfied soul!
The Kundalini on the stomach shows complete self-contented, satisfied personality of Shri
Ganesha.
When you have ALL THE POWERS within YOU, you know you are powerful then you don''t
hanker after all these things, and you don't try to make a position or an impression of
others.
For example he would never go read books like How To Impress People – very common!
So now as we are created in the same image of Shri Ganesha ,you have understand that
You have to accept whatever God has given you, whatever position He's giving.
Same with Christ!
Christ accepted His Father who was just a carpenter – he didn't aspire for something
higher or some sort of special position and power because He is so powerful what
more Power can we have?
Though people mocked at Him laughed at him could not except that but still He
He was self-contented, self satisfied – he knew what it is.
So for a Sahaja Yogi first thing to be self contented as I told you the fundamentals
of Western life are see and to be seen both things were missing completely in the incarnation
So when I say these things, suddenly people start thinking let us become hippies or let
them be come punks.
Let's just became this and that."
You don't have to become anything whatever you've got – your body ,your face . everything
is there!
Just meant for YOU.
You don't have to change anything outwardly, because inside is complete chaitanya.
Shri Ganesha never tried to changed himself though there were so many clouds on his being
Though many people insulted him, tortured him, hanged and crucified him still the eternal
being didn't bother.
So first thing for a Sahaja Yogi is to accept – go on accepting things but when I say
except then other side also that doesn' mean you start accepting all bad qualities
Mother, you said You must accept so they start accepting all these bad qualities.
What's wrong?
We have said it already – whatever I say has another side always!
Like i said now we are becoming our own guru
So why should listen to anybody else like this see
We go on diverting ourselves, deviating ourselves from reality just to cheat our selves and
this comes because we have no wisdom.
We do not know what is for out benevolence?
What should be done in order that even if you don't want it, so what we lack
It's a vicious circle I must say that Ganesha has to be awakened, he is the giver of wisdom.
He is the giver or wisdom and you are not wise because he isn't awakened so very
Let my wisdom shine in My attention, let Shri Ganesha throw His light into My attention.
Mentally you people are very alert no doubt and You can always cheat yourself nicely that's
the point where you could see Yourself introspection which I have seen among Russians just introspect
Why do I like that?
why cannot i meditate, am going to miss out.
Why can not not something good for me introspection is the only way you
Can see yourself how far you are from Shri Ganesha even have seen when
When I say something in general, people always – the mind is very clever.
Thinks that am talking about somebody else not them it's a convex mind which never
receives anything inside itself because there no wisdom if you are wise then not only
that you'll accept, but will understand and it will penetrate into your attention through
the central nervous system.
You just know this is it!
Now if we put our hand towards a candle then one's fingers might burn – you
know definitely with experience…and won't do anything like that.
With experience have learned not to place their hands on the candles.
And this wisdom is there, I don't have to tell you that.
But it's a new life we've started – spiritual life!
When are going into the spiritual life try and remember your experiences one after another
how did You got transformed?
How do You change ?How many bad things that You had disappeared gradually and
how you have become so nice, this will take away your depression to begin with.
Then You should think that what do I need further?
Am i really wise or am stupid there are lots of stages between absolute stupidity
and absolute wisdom And see all those shades all over and combinations
and permutations of these I see every day.
And am surprised after getting your Self-realization when Shri Ganesha is shining in you attention,
You should see Your reflection clearly try to correct it only this much wisdom if
You have that I've to work out my benevolence, you'll do it.
I know of somebody who could never get up in the morning say for example but one day
he saw him ready at about six o'clock on a morning and was surprised how this gentleman
with no self-discipline has suddenly got up by 6 o clock and is really going somewhere
I said, where are you going?
You don't know.
And he said what!
I have got a job now and i've to be present by eight o'clock it will take two hours
for me that place also keeping some margin so
So I can talk quite alert away
Now
What is the thing as far money's concerned lot of wisdom
Don't have to tell them, that is automatically.
Money wisdom it's quite a lot job-wisdom its'quite a lot because these things means
prestige in the society this mean security of our society so kind business you find
many people and some even missing they don''t understand their living but as minimum
Now, you cannot be parasite.
Then the second stage as I said by many stages is this that we are not for money –money
it's us.
The attention if its on your spirit ,on the Ganesha principle then whole situation will
change .Your priorities would change and suddenly people say Mother what has happened
to these gentlemen?
He was a stupid fool now he becomes such wise person!
So, to awaken Shri Ganesha you should have minimum wisdom already there.
I mean even if that is not their how can work it out?
It's meant for stupid people mood has – its' not meant for mood so now what
are our benevolences let us see…is money those who had money don't seem
be very happy people always.
Then what is the next?
Is jobs, those who have job all right should have a job so I'm not saying you shouldn't
be jobless – immediately another side they'll take up…
So quick!
You know that Mother's saying we can do joblessly see nice immediate escapes now

half way they are towards self
one foot there

you can it clearly

wewant to be

accepting Your body, You're accepting
in face everything will see that lot of time
we'll be saved. Another problem
but faces us is planning
and that it's missing in Sri Ganesha completely
he did not do any planing also

Because He's so powerful, whatever he wants you can get it done.

that has no need
to be planning everything
because

Why it happens, why he has this power because He's in that state.

We talk somebody tells Somebody that oh my I've to go and catch the plane there
ten people standing next they'll all get panicky now i have
to go and they are bothered.
Something sort of goes off their heads, I don't know what it is that goes – amuk!
…I never tell them like this but still there's time for the plane to move on
so when we reach then the plane will leave us…so you do not worry.
But because these kinds presumptions or planning systems in your mind just think
That now I have a plan to go today, I must go.
Why?
It won't work!
I may decide at the last minute that if you don´t want me going then let it be.
We did this many times as we know very well and wanted to buy the Rome Ashram
so I saw with my own eyes but the plane never arrived.
But one has got in such a state especially by buying this Cabela you know what happened
there were five great intellectuals on My head sitting.
I didn't know how to manage these five intellectuals with all their planning, this that they made

They all had come here but i was telling them go have a look nobody would listen
Nobody wanted about it How thing work out is your pure desire
that can work out anything, but you won't want funny things also like Shri Ganesha would

all kinds of stupidities because we are stupid these entrepreneurs having good time
they can be foolish at his state he's himself
on top of the pure desire. The pure desire is on his stomach, tied up nicely
It's to be seen in Sahaja Yoga how things work out
How miraculously they workout and these can happen too you also
All this powers come into your
You know about some people who came us
Who didn't even have to sing? I mean there were no voices
Something very funny they had, I mean – I didn't know from where did that to even talk.
When They opened their mouths if you were at one note then on another note and we're
all in our own without even listening what they are singing after some time I find
there's a beautiful so the Kundalini itself is working it out the pure desire is working

anything against Me I have tolerated but nothing

It is for You now to work it out!
Shri Ganesha has just met Him but He's not meant For people who are no courage

Today is such a joyous day for Me because we have children and
We are dealing with Children
Most of them Are born Realized
They're Of A very special Category I've told you many Times
But, We spoil Them
Because.We were not Born Realized
So?
We don't know how to handle these special children, we spoil them.
Not only do you spoil them but interfere with the school and this as if they are the wisest

How can I interfere in any school anywhere?
But in Sahaj Yoga it is because there's no wisdom or understanding of what good
and benevolent for your child.
If you love Your Child then You must think of its benevolence, You must learn from the
experience what happens to children if they are left like that – you cannot spoil
their child because it's a special category there!
They're not children who can become vagabonds or thieves so make them something funny
They are neither here nor there, they're born realized and have to be channelized properly
– achieve their complete manifestation of the Spirit.
So possessiveness or stupid attachments with children must given up
There is no force on you if want destroy a child can destroy
but in an advice
If your Ganesha's would understand
I don't explain so much
What is good for your child, because we have to have beautiful children.

and You've ruined their life
but You are responsible
as I know so many children
